_publications._publicationTitle: HuR/ELAVL1 drives malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor growth and metastasis.

_contextSnippet: Subsequent analysis revealed that whereas control cells efficiently formed tumors (5/5), tumor formation was completely abolished in HuR-silenced cells (0/5)
